title: ‘Place for everyone’: London Mayor shares festival images from Iftar to Diwali
summary_full: London's Mayor Sadiq Khan celebrated diversity and unity at a large open Iftar gathering in Trafalgar Square, attended by approximately 3,000 people. This event, part of the Ramadan Tent Project's Open Iftar programme, marked the closing of the Ramadan Festival 2026. The gathering featured speeches, Qur'an recitation, and a nasheed performance, reinforcing London as a city for everyone.
